headline: Is Deere (DE) Still Attractive After A 20% Year To Date Share Price Climb
summary: If you are trying to work out whether Deere stock at around US$561.83 is offering good value today, you need more than just the headline share price. The stock is up 20.4% year to date, even though it has slipped 2.3% over the past week and 2.6% over the past month. This may change how you think about both upside and risk. Recent coverage has focused on Deere's position as a key supplier of agricultural and construction equipment, and how that links to long term spending on food production...
